title: Add in-app learning loop (question generation, scoring, and history)
summary: Implemented Mission Control learning APIs and workspace page that generates architecture-reasoning questions from recent decisions, scores operator answers, and recommends next concepts/resources.
changes: Added decision-log-backed learning question generation and expected-answer contracts.
Added answer scoring logic with rubric-like keyword coverage, tradeoff/risk checks, and grade mapping.
Added feedback and concept-resource suggestion output on scoring.
Added learning page UI with generate/answer/history workflow.
Added header navigation to learning page.
risks: Current scorer is heuristic; semantic grading sophistication can be improved in later eval slices.
Question generation currently defaults to decision-log context when explicit diff context is absent.
rollback: Remove learning APIs/page and header link if training workflow is paused; keep eval core intact.
